creator: Roger.Savard@henoc.com
text:
A workaround is with the use the variable 
Emulate3Timeout and set the timeout higher.

Section "Pointer"
   Protocol        "GlidePoint"
   Device          "/dev/psm0"
   BaudRate        1200
   Emulate3Timeout 210 <<<
   Resolution      100
   Buttons         3
   Emulate3Buttons
EndSection

OS: FreeBSD 3.4-Stable 
WM: WindowMaker windowmaker-0.61.1
XF86: V336
--
